docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PERALTA TIMOTHY AS TO DEFENDANT NOTAS CONSTADINO GUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED REFUSED.
